ch9_start.text: You sprint away from the swarm, heading straight for the Engineering Bay. The station is groaning loudly under the immense pressure. If another sector collapses, it's over.

ch9_engineering.text: The Engineering Bay is a mess of ruptured pipes and sparking consoles. Arthur, the senior engineer, is slumped against the primary drill controls, a wrench in his shaking hands. He looks up at you, his eyes bloodshot.
ch9_engineering.speaker: Arthur

choices.text: 'Arthur, we need to stabilize the pressure!'

ch9_arthur_confession.text: 'It's no use,' Arthur sobs. 'I broke it. The drill... I sabotaged it. I didn't want them digging deeper. I saw the geological scans. There were hollow spaces down there. But they wouldn't listen. Corporate never listens.'
ch9_arthur_confession.speaker: Arthur

ch9_arthur_ptsd.text: 'I was trying to stop the drilling! I just wanted to jam the gears!' he yells, throwing the wrench. 'But the torque... it shattered the cavern roof instead. I let that thing out. It's my fault Miller is dead.'
ch9_arthur_ptsd.speaker: Arthur

choices.text: 'We can still fix this, Arthur. Stand up.'

ch9_arthur_punch.text: You strike Arthur across the face. He doesn't even try to defend himself, just slumps back to the floor, defeated. 'I deserve worse,' he whispers.

choices.text: Try to fix the pressure valves yourself.

ch9_arthur_help.text: Arthur looks at you, tears mixing with the grease on his face. He slowly gets to his feet. 'Okay. Okay, let's reroute the auxiliary power. We might be able to hold the bulkheads.'

choices.text: Work with Arthur to stabilize the sector.
